source_old_req: The acc6_dataOutput thread shall operate periodically with a period of 4000 ms and a deadline of 500 ms, with a priority of 1 and a stack size of 20 KByte. It shall receive input via the acc_command_in event data port of type SHM_DataType::actionData and produce output via the accout data port of type SHM_DataType::accData. The accout port shall be updated on each activation based solely on the most recent values received on the acc_command_in port and the internal computations performed by the acc6_dataOutput.impl implementation. Environmental assumptions shall be made that the acc_command_in port provides valid data at each sampling instance. The thread shall ensure that the value assigned to accout at any time is determined exclusively by the current input on acc_command_in and the thread's internal state, and that the data type constraints of the accout port are never violated.
natural_requirement: The acc6_dataOutput component shall define the implementation-level signal routing for acc6_dataOutput.impl. In the implementation layer, acc6_dataOutput.impl shall route data flow from spg.accDataOut to accout through C1 and control signal from acc_command_in to spg.event_in through C2.

requirement_items.text: The acc6_dataOutput.impl implementation shall route the data flow from spg.accDataOut to accout through connection C1.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The acc6_dataOutput.impl implementation shall declare connection C1 from spg.accDataOut to accout.

requirement_items.text: The acc6_dataOutput.impl implementation shall route the control signal from acc_command_in to spg.event_in through connection C2.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The acc6_dataOutput.impl implementation shall declare connection C2 from acc_command_in to spg.event_in.

quality_policy.traceable: Every item has trace_refs and expected_check metadata tied to AADL facts.
quality_policy.principle: Every generated sentence must name an explicit property assignment or structural connection; ordinary feature declarations are not used as rebuilt requirements.

natural_requirement_before_behavior_styl: The acc6_dataOutput.impl implementation shall declare connection C1 from spg.accDataOut to accout. The acc6_dataOutput.impl implementation shall declare connection C2 from acc_command_in to spg.event_in.

behavior_style_policy.basis: front-110 AGREE-derived requirements favor implementable behavior, constants, assumptions, guarantees, routing, and bounded properties.
behavior_style_policy.rule: Do not describe unsupported validity/legal-boundary semantics unless the AADL model exposes variables, values, or properties that can implement them.

natural_requirement_before_paragraph_rew: The acc6_dataOutput.impl implementation shall route the data flow from spg.accDataOut to accout through connection C1. The acc6_dataOutput.impl implementation shall route the control signal from acc_command_in to spg.event_in through connection C2.

paragraph_style_policy.rule: Req.txt is written as a natural-language requirement paragraph; per-item traceability stays in requirement_items.
paragraph_style_policy.basis: Front-110 AGREE-derived requirements generally combine function, assumptions, guarantees, and implementation notes into 1-4 sentence paragraphs.
